description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short sleeves, appliqued brand tab towards left hem and graphic print on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryUpgrade your casual look with this white graphic t-shirt from lee. The graphic print on the chest urges you to "Make your own path", while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3& rdquo , Shoulders-19"
